TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Maia Sandu Maia Sandu (ryax sa 24 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1972 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Moldova ta' misuw hya' ga Maia Sandu, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Maia Sandu minkahul sa Risipeni na Moldova. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: maia s~…ēan*u maia s~…ēan*u (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw mol*o*a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a maia s~…ēan*u, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral maia s~…ēan*u minkańßul s~…ēa ris~…ēipeni na mol*o*a. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
